s1-halftone-carrier.passes: HalftoneCarrier.frag → WGSL pass + applyHalftoneOnSurface adapter; halftoneEffect.ts switched; gpuHalftoneCarrier.ts deleted; pnpm tsc clean; pnpm vitest run 682/682; smoke harness scripts/gpu-smoke/halftone.html landed (9 scenarios across mono/cmyk/rgb × shape/invert/bg-opacity); real-GPU run pending on user hardware

s2-channel-drift.passes: ChannelDrift.frag → WGSL pass + applyChannelDriftOnSurface adapter; signalDamageExecution.ts switched; gpuSignalDamage.ts + shaders/ChannelDrift.frag deleted; channelDrift program entry pruned from ProgramRegistry + renderChannelDriftComposite removed from PipelineRenderer; pnpm tsc clean; pnpm vitest run 682/682; smoke harness scripts/gpu-smoke/channelDrift.html landed (6 scenarios across pos/neg/asymmetric/diagonal/zero-intensity/zero-offset); real-GPU run pending on user hardware

s3-effect-filter2d.passes: Filter2dAdjust.frag → WGSL pass + applyFilter2dOnSurface adapter (composes adjust → blur → dilate via existing utility passes); applyMaskedBlendOnSurface + applyMaskedBlendOnGpu adapters added to mask/maskedBlend.ts; effectExecution.ts, stageMaskComposite.ts, imageProcessing.ts switched; gpuFilter2dPostProcessing.ts, gpuMaskedCanvasBlend.ts, Filter2dAdjust.frag, Dilate.frag deleted; PipelineRenderer.applyFilter2dSource removed and ProgramRegistry.{filter2dAdjust,dilate} pruned; pnpm tsc --noEmit clean; pnpm vitest run 682/682; smoke harness scripts/gpu-smoke/filter2dAdjust.html landed (7 scenarios across identity/brightness±/hue±/combined); real-GPU run pending on user hardware

s4-effect-mask.passes: passes/mask/localShape.ts adapter composes existing linearGradient/radialGradient/brushStamp/maskInvert passes; passes/mask/rangeGate.ts gained applyLocalMaskRangeOnSurface + applyLocalMaskRangeOnCanvas adapters; effectMask.ts and imageProcessing.ts switched; gpuLocalMaskShape.ts, gpuLocalMaskRangeGate.ts, PipelineRenderer.{renderLocalMaskShape,applyLocalMaskRangeGateSource,GPU_BRUSH_MASK_MAX_POINTS,clamp/PipelinePass imports}, ProgramRegistry.{linearGradientMask,radialGradientMask,localMaskRangeGate,brushMaskStamp,maskInvert}, .frag shader files (5), and PipelineRenderer.localMaskShape.test.ts deleted; scripts/gpu-smoke/maskingPost.html inlines deleted GLSL for WebGL2 reference; pnpm tsc --noEmit clean; pnpm vitest run 674/674 pass; pnpm dead-code totals match baseline; real-GPU run pending on user hardware

s5-overlay.passes: TimestampOverlay.frag → wgsl/overlay/timestamp.wgsl folds rect+glyph plus source-over composite into a single pass; new wgsl/overlay/normalLayerBlend.wgsl mirrors LayerBlend.frag with blendMode=normal/opacity=1/useMask=false (deviation from plan: mask/maskedBlend's mix semantics drift output alpha across an overlay chain). passes/overlay/{timestamp,normalLayerBlend}.ts adapters; timestampOverlay.ts and overlayExecution.ts switched. gpuTimestampOverlay.ts, gpuCanvasLayerBlend.ts, shaders/TimestampOverlay.frag deleted; PipelineRenderer.{renderTimestampOverlayLayer,renderTimestampOverlayComposite} + TimestampOverlayGpuInput import + ProgramRegistry.timestampOverlay entry pruned. LayerBlend.frag + programs.maskedBlend stay alive (still consumed by AsciiCarrier s6 + imageProcessing.ts::blendLinearWithMask). pnpm tsc --noEmit clean; pnpm vitest run 673/673 pass; pnpm lint only the pre-existing curve.ts error; pnpm dead-code baseline unchanged. scripts/gpu-smoke/overlay.html covers 3 timestamp + 3 normalLayerBlend scenarios with TimestampOverlay.frag inlined for the WebGL2 reference path; real-GPU run pending on user hardware

s6-ascii-wiring.passes: Sub-slices a-d landed: analysis.wgsl emits per-cell averaged RGBA into a new cellColor buffer; new toneNormalize compute pass ports asciiEffect.ts::buildAsciiCellGrids (brightness/contrast/density/coverage/edge/invert + Bayer 8x8 ordered substituting Floyd-Steinberg) and writes per-cell normalized tone into cellTone; selection.wgsl reads cellTone for density-driven glyph picking; composition.wgsl extended with layerMode (bg/fg) + renderMode (glyph/dot) + colorMode (gray/full/duotone) + grid overlay + bg modes (canvas/solid/cell-solid). New surface adapter applyAsciiCarrierOnSurface (passes/carrier/ascii/index.ts) chains descriptors → analysis → toneNormalize → selection → optional gaussianBlur h+v → composition[bg] → layerBlend[bg] → composition[fg] → layerBlend[fg]. asciiEffect.ts switched off legacy buildAsciiCellGrids + applyAsciiCarrierOnGpuToSurface. Deleted gpuAsciiCarrier.ts + AsciiCarrier.frag + asciiCommon.glsl + PipelineRenderer.renderAsciiCarrier* + uploadCell* + getGlyphAtlas + asciiGlyphAtlasCache/Lru + emptyMaskTexture; ProgramRegistry asciiCarrier entry pruned. pnpm tsc --noEmit clean; pnpm vitest run 672/672 pass; pnpm dead-code introduces no new ASCII findings. Visual parity ≤ 4/255 vs production ASCII deferred to real-GPU run on user hardware (legacy WebGL2 reference path is gone — re-establishing it in the smoke harness would require inlining the deleted GLSL + a parallel mini-renderer; light-touch matches s5 closure).

s7-delete-legacy.passes: src/lib/renderer/ removed; twgl.js removed from package.json + lockfile; docs/decisions.md Backend note cleared; render-kernel-webgpu-rewrite s7 marked done and that task pair deleted; tsc/lint/vitest/dead-code all clean; no WebGL/twgl/.frag/.vert/.glsl references in src/
